title: Domain pack search_templates.yaml loader proof (NM-5 continuation)
problem: Ticket-117 proved card_templates.yaml drives public export template validation. The creativity pack still has three other declarative files not loaded at runtime. NM-5 requires incremental proof that domain-pack files beyond the seven already loaded are consumed by the engine.
acceptance_criteria: search_templates.yaml is loaded for creativity domain pack at runtime.
At least one existing consumer reads pack-defined query templates instead of hardcoded duplicates.
Temp-pack unit test proves different template config changes planner or queue behavior.
Golden tests and manual synthnote tests remain green in mock mode.
non_goals: No loading all remaining pack files in one ticket.
No public site routing or committed JSON changes.
No cloud providers or live Ollama changes.
rollback_plan: Revert search_templates loader wiring; restore inline planner constants.
